groups.title: WORDS PRONOUNCED DIFFERENT WAYS AS PROPER NOUNS
groups.explanation: WORDS PRONOUNCED DIFFERENT WAYS AS PROPER NOUNS

hints: Studio-pottery setup clues: raw material, surface finish, the high-heat chamber, and the spinning platform.
Hard-hit slang from fight commentary: four verbs meaning to strike someone with force.
Same spelling, different pronunciation when treated as names or places; dictionary and proper-noun readings diverge.
Prefix puzzle: put one short hyphenated starter in front of each to form common expressions.
